scripts.diagrams: mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-architecture.mmd       -o static/img/diagrams/turing-architecture.svg       && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-indexing-flow.mmd      -o static/img/diagrams/turing-indexing-flow.svg      && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-search-flow.mmd       -o static/img/diagrams/turing-search-flow.svg       && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-targeting-rules-flow.mmd -o static/img/diagrams/turing-targeting-rules-flow.svg && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-agent-flow.mmd         -o static/img/diagrams/turing-agent-flow.svg         && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-rag-flow.mmd            -o static/img/diagrams/turing-rag-flow.svg            && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/turing-chat-layout.mmd        -o static/img/diagrams/turing-chat-layout.svg        && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/dumont-architecture.mmd      -o static/img/diagrams/dumont-architecture.svg      && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/dumont-indexing-flow.mmd     -o static/img/diagrams/dumont-indexing-flow.svg     && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/dumont-pipeline.mmd          -o static/img/diagrams/dumont-pipeline.svg          && mmdc -p puppeteer-config.json -w 900 -H 600 -b transparent -i diagrams/dumont-strategy-flow.mmd     -o static/img/diagrams/dumont-strategy-flow.svg
